plannedCases: partial analysis with no synced lyrics
meter-aware tempo correction from web evidence
notes: Canonical package-alignment runner is app_level_structure_eval.py because it exercises packaged prompts/corpus plus app-level audio-analysis behavior.
structure_eval.py remains useful as a lower-level service-only runner, but it is not sufficient for full package/runtime parity.
Eval should validate artifact/handoff behavior, not sequence mutation behavior.
Partial analysis is a passing outcome when correctly classified and preserved.
